subject: Minotia, a young figure with pink-rose spiky hair in a dynamic pose with purple energy effects
suspected_ip: Minotia (Dragon Ball Z: Wrath of the Dragon)
description: A young-looking humanoid figure with distinctively pink or rose-toned spiky hair is shown in a dynamic energy-filled composition. Purple and violet energy effects surround the figure, creating an atmosphere of latent or unleashed power. The figure's pose and build read as a younger or smaller fighter compared to adult warrior figures in the same set. The 'Hidden Darkness' naming combined with the purple energy suggests a parallel treatment to the Tapion card — another character carrying a concealed demonic curse or sealed power. At 624×871 resolution, the figure's general form and hair color are clearly visible even if facial detail is soft.
foreground: young figure with pink-rose spiky hair surrounded by purple energy
background: purple-violet energy burst and dark void
emotion: tense determination, the look of someone bracing against a force inside themselves
